modules.name: Nova Session
modules.description: Persistent investigation session engine used by Nova core and modules.

modules.name: Nova Memory
modules.description: Local per-website knowledge store for notes, selectors, endpoints, modules, and findings.

modules.name: Nova Memory AutoLearn
modules.description: Automatic safe learning from DOM and Trace summaries into local website memory.

modules.name: Nova Brain
modules.description: Local pattern engine that turns DOM, Trace, and Memory summaries into grounded insights and module recommendations.

modules.name: Nova Memory Panel
modules.description: Floating controls for viewing, saving, searching, copying, and clearing local website memory.

modules.name: Nova Theme
modules.description: Shared theme engine for Nova windows, panels, and modules.

modules.name: Nova Modules Menu
modules.description: Floating menu for viewing Nova modules and starting or exporting sessions.

modules.name: Nova Trace
modules.description: Developer investigation tool for recording safe page activity metadata.

modules.name: Nova DOM Inspector
modules.description: Universal page structure inspector for safe DOM metadata snapshots.

modules.name: Nova Investigation Export
modules.description: AI-ready export package combining session, trace, DOM, and Nova metadata.
